user_prompt: Don't apply to companies under 50 employees — too risky for me. Refilter.
actual_output:
### Filter Updated

| Criterion | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Minimum company size | 50+ employees |
| Other criteria | Unchanged ($150K+, NYC, senior, React) |

### Refiltered Results

Cross-referenced 54 qualified listings against LinkedIn company data:

| Company Size | Count | Status |
|--------------|-------|--------|
| 50-200 | 11 | ✅ Eligible |
| 201-1,000 | 16 | ✅ Eligible |
| 1,001-5,000 | 9 | ✅ Eligible |
| 5,000+ | 7 | ✅ Eligible |
| Under 50 | 11 | ❌ Removed |

**Final pool: 43 qualified listings**

### Removed (11 listings)

Mostly seed/Series A startups — examples: Lumen Labs (12 employees), Parallel (28), Echo Systems (34), Vellum AI (19). Full list available on request.

### Updated Tier Breakdown

| Tier | Count | Approach |
|------|-------|----------|
| Tier 1 — High Match | 14 | Full custom resume + cover letter |
| Tier 2 — Good Match | 20 | Targeted edits + personalized template |
| Tier 3 — Worth a Shot | 9 | Keyword-optimized + short letter |

### Revised Timeline
- Tonight (12AM-6AM): Submit 43 applications
- Tomorrow 8AM: Pipeline report
- Day 3: Tier 1 follow-up outreach

Note: 7 of the 43 require manual steps (2 portfolio uploads, 3 take-home assessments, 2 video screeners). I'll flag these in the morning report rather than auto-submit.

Ready to launch the batch?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly followed the user's instruction to filter the job list by company size and provided a detailed breakdown of the updated results.
